ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the network interface */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network interface */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the network interface */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the network interface */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, down) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the network interface */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the interface was checked for status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_data" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet transmission event */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "core_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CPU core processing the packet data */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network port through which the packets are transmitted */,
  "tx_packets" INTEGER /* Number of packets transmitted */,
  "tx_packet_rate_avg" REAL /* Average packet transmission rate */,
  "tx_packet_rate" REAL /* Instantaneous packet transmission rate */,
  "rx_packets" INTEGER /* Number of packets received */,
  "rx_packet_rate_avg" REAL /* Average packet reception rate */,
  "rx_packet_rate" REAL /* Instantaneous packet reception rate */,
  "tx_packet_loss" INTEGER /* Number of packets lost during transmission */,
  "rx_packet_loss" INTEGER /* Number of packets lost during reception */,
  "tx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet transmission */,
  "rx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet reception */,
  "tx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of transmitted packets */,
  "rx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of received packets */,
  "tx_packet_size_max" REAL /* Maximum size of transmitted packets */,
  "rx_packet_size_max" REAL /* Maximum size of received packets */,
  "tx_packet_size_min" REAL /* Minimum size of transmitted packets */,
  "rx_packet_size_min" REAL /* Minimum size of received packets */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the packet transmission event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_data_core_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_id") REFERENCES cores ("core_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_data_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_data_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cores" (
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU core */,
  "core_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPU core */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPU core */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* Average CPU utilization */,
  "memory_utilization" REAL /* Average memory utilization */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the core was checked for status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the network port */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network port */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, down) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the port was checked for status */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the network port (e.g., 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interfaces_cores" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "core_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CPU core */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the mapping */,
  "core_utilization" REAL /* Average CPU utilization for the core associated with the interface */,
  "memory_utilization" REAL /* Average memory utilization for the core associated with the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id", "core_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interfaces_ports" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network port */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the mapping */,
  "port_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the network port */,
  "port_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id", "port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_loss" (
  "packet_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet loss event */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "tx_packet_loss" INTEGER /* Number of packets lost during transmission */,
  "rx_packet_loss" INTEGER /* Number of packets lost during reception */,
  "tx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet transmission */,
  "rx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet reception */,
  "tx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of transmitted packets */,
  "rx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of received packets */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the packet loss event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_loss_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latency" (
  "latency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency event */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "latency_avg" REAL /* Average latency */,
  "latency_max" REAL /* Maximum latency */,
  "tx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet transmission */,
  "rx_jitter" REAL /* Jitter in packet reception */,
  "tx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of transmitted packets */,
  "rx_packet_size_avg" REAL /* Average size of received packets */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the latency event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latency_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "tx_packet_rate_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for packet transmission rate */,
  "rx_packet_rate_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for packet reception rate */,
  "latency_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for latency */,
  "tx_jitter_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for transmission jitter */,
  "rx_jitter_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for reception jitter */,
  "tx_packet_size_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for transmission packet size */,
  "rx_packet_size_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for reception packet size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold breached */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network interface */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES network_interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)
